task: Slack OAuth social channel, extension install card CSS, RLS migration for slack_connections

slackOAuthUI.summary: Added signInWithSlack() to authClient.js, Slack button with SVG to login page, selector/handler/event listener in LoginPage.jsx, Slack CSS style in login.css.

slackSocialChannel.summary: Added 'slack' to VALID_TARGET_SOCIALS, SOCIAL_LINKS, formatSocialLabel. Added slack provider branch in verifySocialAccount. Added saveSlackToken and slack in listSocialConnections in hades.service. Added POST /socials/slack/token route. Created slackConnectionRepository with findPublicByUser/findBySlackUserId. Wired slackConnections in index.js.

extensionInstallCSS.summary: Added missing CSS for extension-install-card: card-header, card-body, card-actions, secret-display, key-list, key-row, key-preview, key-actions .small/.small.danger, revoked-label. 17 lines added to hadesPrototype.css.

migration010.summary: 010_hades_slack_connections.sql: table with user_id, tenant_id, encrypted_token, token_last4, slack_user_id, slack_team_id, status.

migration011.summary: 011_hades_slack_rls.sql: ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies keyed on user_id.

hermes500Investigation.summary: Needs Railway CLI for live log confirmation.

testResults.summary: Backend 573/576 pass (3 pre-existing). Frontend 377/377 pass. Zero regressions.
